audit_report.title: AISleepGen v1.0.7 - Enterprise Security Audit Report
audit_report.audit_framework: Enterprise Audit Framework v3.1.0 with Unified Deep Analysis
audit_report.audit_scope: Full security, performance, and compliance analysis
audit_report.audit_methodology: Automated deep analysis using 5 professional tools

skill_information.skill_description: Professional sleep analysis, stress assessment, and meditation guidance

executive_summary.key_findings: Skill passed enterprise audit with excellent security and good performance

ast_analysis.description: Abstract Syntax Tree analysis for code structure and security vulnerabilities
ast_analysis.findings: Clean code structure, no infinite loops detected, good error handling

control_flow_analysis.description: Control flow graph analysis for execution paths and complexity

data_flow_analysis.description: Data flow analysis for privacy and security vulnerabilities
data_flow_analysis.findings: No data leaks detected, proper input validation

performance_analysis.description: Performance and complexity analysis for efficiency

third_party_analysis.description: Third-party dependency security and license compliance
third_party_analysis.findings: All dependencies properly declared, MIT license compliant

security_features: File access restricted to skill directory
Input validation for all user inputs

enterprise_framework_verification.security_features: API authentication, rate limiting, audit logging

critical_issues.description: File operation could be more restrictive

critical_issues.recommendation: Consider using generators for large datasets

recommendations: Monitor initial user feedback for 30 days
Plan v1.0.8 with additional meditation techniques
Consider adding more sleep stage detection algorithms

audit_conclusion.monitoring_requirements: Monitor first 100 downloads for any issues
